name: hicad
description: HiCAD - AI driven parametric 3D CAD modeling platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c cyan,green,blue "pnpm --filter @hicad/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @hicad/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @hicad/frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @hicad/shared build && pnpm --filter @hicad/backend build && pnpm --filter @hicad/frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @hicad/shared test && pnpm --filter @hicad/backend test && pnpm --filter @hicad/frontend test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hicad/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @hicad/backend typecheck && pnpm --filter @hicad/frontend typecheck
scripts.ci:quality: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm audit:prod && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm bundle:check && pnpm test:e2e
